description: Used for displaying tabular data. Supports searching, grouping, sorting and pagination.

props.collapseIcon: Icon to display when the expandable row is expanded.
props.density: Adjusts the vertical height of the table rows.
props.expandIcon: Icon to display when the expandable row is collapsed.
props.fixedHeader: Fixed header to top of table.
props.groupBy: Configures attributes (and sort order) to group items together. Can be customized further with `group-header` and `group-summary` slots.
props.groupCollapseIcon: Icon to display when the row group is expanded.
props.groupExpandIcon: Icon to display when the row group is collapsed.
props.headerProps: Pass props to the default header. See [`v-data-table-headers` API](/api/v-data-table-headers) for more information.
props.headers: An array of objects that each describe a header column.
props.height: Set an explicit height of table.
props.hover: Adds a hover effects to a table rows.
props.itemsPerPage: Changes how many items per page should be visible. Can be bound to external variable using **v-model:itemsPerPage**.. Setting this prop to `-1` will display all items on the page.
props.showSelect: Shows the select checkboxes in both the header and rows (if using default rows).
props.showExpand: Shows the expand toggle in default rows.
props.sortBy: Changes which item property (or properties) should be used for sort order. Can be bound to external variable using **v-model:sortBy**..

slots.[`header.${string}`]: Slot for custom rendering of a header cell.
slots.[`item.${string}`]: Slot for custom rendering of a row cell.
slots.header.data-table-expand: Slot to replace the default `v-icon` used when expanding header.
slots.body: Slot to replace the default table `<tbody>`.
slots.body.append: Appends elements to the end of the default table `<tbody>`.
slots.body.prepend: Prepends elements to the start of the default table `<tbody>`.
slots.bottom: Slot for custom rendering of a data table footer.
slots.colgroup: Slot to replace the default rendering of the `<colgroup>` element.
slots.footer.prepend: Adds content to the empty space in the footer.
slots.group-header: Slot for custom rendering of a group header.
slots.group-summary: Slot for custom rendering of a group summary.
slots.header.<name>: Slot to customize a specific header column.
slots.header.data-table-select: Slot to replace the default `v-checkbox-btn` in header.
slots.headers: An array of objects that each describe a header column.
slots.item: Slot to replace the default rendering of a row.
slots.item.data-table-select: Slot to replace the default `v-checkbox-btn` used when selecting rows.
slots.item.data-table-expand: Slot to replace the default `v-icon` used when expanding rows.
slots.item.<name>: Slot to customize a specific column.
slots.loading: Defines content for when `loading` is true and no items are provided.
slots.tbody: Slot to replace the default table `<tbody>`.
slots.thead: Slot to replace the default table `<thead>`.
slots.tfoot: Slot to replace the default table `<tfoot>`.
slots.no-data: Defines content for when no items are provided.
slots.top: Slot to add content above the table.

events.click:row: Emits when a table row is clicked. This event provides 2 arguments: the first is the native click event, and the second is an object containing the corresponding item for that row. **NOTE:** will not emit when table rows are defined through a slot such as `item` or `body`.
events.contextmenu:row: Emits when a table row is right-clicked. The item for the row is included. **NOTE:** will not emit when table rows are defined through a slot such as `item` or `body`.
events.dblclick:row: Emits when a table row is double-clicked. The item for the row is included. **NOTE:** will not emit when table rows are defined through a slot such as `item` or `body`.
events.update:currentItems: Emits with the items currently being displayed.
events.update:groupBy: Emits when the **group-by** prop is updated.
events.update:itemsPerPage: Emits when the **items-per-page** prop is updated.
events.update:modelValue: Emits when the component's model changes.
events.update:options: Emits when pagination related properties (page, itemsPerPage, sortBy, groupBy, search) is updated.
events.update:page: Emits when the **page** prop is updated.
events.update:sortBy: Emits when the **sortBy** prop is updated.
